testcase.name: contextLoads
testcase.system-out:
11:44:22.702 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.example.demoserver.DemoServerApplicationTests]: DemoServerApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 11:44:22.775 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.example.demoserver.DemoServerApplication for test class com.example.demoserver.DemoServerApplicationTests

2026-04-23T11:44:23.140+08:00 INFO 34672 --- [demo-server] [ main] c.e.d.DemoServerApplicationTests : Starting DemoServerApplicationTests using Java 17.0.12 with PID 34672 (started by 吴景强 in D:\ccwm01\test\demo02\demo-server) 2026-04-23T11:44:23.142+08:00 INFO 34672 --- [demo-server] [ main] c.e.d.DemoServerApplicationTests : No active profile set, falling back to 1 default profile: "default" 2026-04-23T11:44:24.287+08:00 INFO 34672 --- [demo-server] [ main] c.e.d.DemoServerApplicationTests : Started DemoServerApplicationTests in 1.368 seconds (process running for 2.381)
